room.caption: [98] None of this makes any sense.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(98)
backFollow=instance_create(0,0,oBackgroundFollow) backFollow.type=2 backFollow.backSet=backMeadeland1 backFollow.xMoveScale=0.6 backFollow.yMoveScale=1 backFollow.depth=1499999
sideChat=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh1SideA)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(1) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)

instance.creationCode: bShowArrow=true exitType=1 newMapX=1680 newMapY=304 toRoom=rMain_72 colorChange=1

sprite_index=sPitfallSign stringToShow="Many come down, many don't return. You look into the pit; Do you jump, or do you stay for eternity?#Others may ask; How do I get out of this without raising my death count by one?" signSize=3
